who: small law firms processing 5–15 expense reports/month
offer: For small law firms processing 5–15 expense reports/month, inefficient manual processes cause delays in reimbursement approvals. We automate expense report compilation and submission instead of manual compilation and submission of expense reports.
problem: Inefficient manual expense report compilation and approval process
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for small law firms
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on workflows
DM outreach to small law firms with demo video
Participate in community forums for law firms
try_it: Let users try manual entry of expenses on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a 1-page landing page with CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow CSV import for existing data
Enable one-click export of simple reports
